query: github remote repository identity dashboard graph visualization

results.title: Repository graph explorer flow
results.content: Added admin repository graph read APIs and Astro dashboard explorer for synced repo graphs. Backend: src/minder/application/admin/use_cases.py adds summary/search/impact methods backed by GraphTools; src/minder/presentation/http/admin/api.py exposes /v1/admin/repositories/{repo_id}/graph-summary, graph-search, and graph-impact. Frontend: src/dashboard/src/lib/api/admin.ts adds typed graph client calls; src/dashboard/src/components/RepositoryGraphExplorerShell.astro, src/dashboard/src/pages/repositories/index.astro, and src/dashboard/src/scripts/repositories-page.ts add the repository explorer UI. Validation: uv run pytest tests/integration/test_http_admin_expansion.py, uv run ruff check ..., uv run mypy ..., cd src/dashboard && bun run check.

results.title: Design docs: skill catalog and metadata-first graph
results.content: Added requirements/design docs for Dashboard skill CRUD and provider-agnostic Git import, and updated canonical architecture/planning docs to make GraphNode metadata-first with optional bounded reusable excerpts only. Files: docs/requirements/skill_management_and_graph_metadata.md, docs/design/skill_management_and_graph_metadata.md, docs/system-design.md, docs/plan/01-product-scope.md, docs/plan/02-architecture.md, docs/plan/03-data-model-and-tools.md, docs/plan/05-implementation-phases.md, docs/TASK_BREAKDOWN.md, docs/PROJECT_PROGRESS.md

results.title: Client-key graph sync and richer Python extractor
results.content: Extended the CLI-edge transition with a client-authenticated graph sync route using X-Minder-Client-Key and repo-scope enforcement, a minimal minder login command that stores client credentials locally, and richer Python RepoScanner extraction for functions, classes, interfaces, abstract classes, controllers, routes, TODOs, external service calls, and MQ topics. Updated transition progress docs and validated with focused pytest, ruff, and mypy runs.

results.title: Delete-aware CLI graph sync tombstones
results.content: Extended graph sync to carry deleted_files through src/minder/cli.py, src/minder/tools/repo_scanner.py, and src/minder/application/admin/dto.py. AdminConsoleUseCases.sync_repository_graph now prunes repo-scoped graph nodes whose metadata.path matches deleted files using IGraphRepository.list_nodes and KnowledgeGraphStore.list_nodes. Added integration coverage in tests/integration/test_http_admin_expansion.py and updated progress docs.

results.title: Phase 3 MCP graph resources and impact tool
results.content: Advanced the CLI-edge transition by wiring a dedicated graph store into the runtime server and transport, adding graph-backed MCP resources minder://repos/{repo_name}/structure and minder://repos/{repo_name}/todos, and exposing a scoped minder_find_impact tool for repo-local impact traversal. Updated transition docs and validated with focused pytest, ruff, and mypy.
